base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of weapons — a projectile (special_attack_proj) from 1993 doom. 7 weapons — Fist/Pistol/Shotgun/Chaingun/Rocket Launcher/Plasma Rifle/BFG 9000 + firing animations. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: 7 weapons — Fist/Pistol/Shotgun/Chaingun/Rocket Launcher/Plasma Rifle/BFG 9000 + firing animations
